_comment: Clickity (useclickity.com) is a SEAN — a Software-Enabled Agency / AI-native social media management service (humans-lead-AI). See context/product-context.md. IMPORTANT: 'direct_competitors' here = SERP/benchmark domains to analyze for ranking + content-gap research, NOT business rivals. Business rivals are AI content tools (Blaze, Holo) + agencies; per the context doc, do NOT name competitors in published copy unless writing deliberate comparison content. Buffer/Hootsuite/Sprout are SOFTWARE (DIY tools), not what Clickity is — they are kept only as informational-SERP benchmarks because they own the social-media how-to content space. Do not chase generic tool head terms.
